failures.description: The agent selected the wrong item from the ProductCatalogSearch results, treating item 2243454707 at $164.46 as the cheapest even though the tool output showed item 1240311797 at $137.17 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call at steps 2-3 was correct and returned available electric kettles sorted by ascending price. The relevant tool output clearly shows item 1240311797 priced at $137.17 as the first and cheapest result. At step 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 2243454707 at $164.46, which is the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This is a direct misinterpretation of the tool output, not a malformed tool call, missing user information, unsupported intent, or guardrail/system issue.
